title: GROW UP SHOW -Sunflower Circus-
titleRomaji: Grow Up Show: Himawari no Circus-dan
titleNative: グロウアップショウ ～ひまわりのサーカス団～
synopsis: The anime's story is set in the late 1950s and early 1960s, during the height of Japan's economic boom, when the circus is a major form of entertainment. Different circus troupes travel throughout Japan to perform and compete for a chance to participate in the world-renowned festival called "Circus Collection." One troupe called the "Sunflower Circus," led by its ringmaster Maria, travels around Japan to perform, despite struggling with financial difficulties. However, they meet a circus prodigy named Mizuka Tsurumaki. This is the story of a one-of-a-kind circus show of young girls with big dreams. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Ling Tian Du Zun
synopsis: Ling Tian, ​​a sword saint of his generation, went against the will of heaven to seize the stele in order to save his beloved, but was plotted against by the way of heaven. When he fell, he perished together with the way of heaven, but was unexpectedly reborn, returning to the moment of his death three hundred years ago when his dantian was completely destroyed and his sword bone was taken away. His beauty is still there, his old enemy is still there, and he has been on the long road to becoming a saint, so why not start over? In this life, he vows to rewrite his destiny and make up for his regrets! (Source: iQIYI, translated)

title: Xiao Xian Zhi Yao
synopsis: He Wan, the leader of the Hidden Clan feared by all three realms, suddenly attacked the Heavenly Palace. The Supreme God Nan Ze came to fight. In order to protect Nan Ze, the jade-growing fairy Yu Zhiyao risked her life to save him. When she and He Wan were about to perish together, she was unexpectedly reborn. By mistake, Yu Zhiyao was reborn into He Wan's body. After the rebirth, He Wan's Hidden Power was greatly damaged. Ting Zhao, the Hidden Guard of the West Sea, came to help the leader He Wan recover her Hidden Power. Since then, Zhiyao was forced to embark on the road of a two-faced female leader, pretending to be majestic in front of others and being charming in front of the king... (Source: iQIYI, Google translated)

title: Taigu Zhan Hun
synopsis: An all-powerful Martial Emperor is killed and returns to life after tens of thousands of years in the body of a young man named Qin Feng. With his supreme martial soul awakened and his practice of the martial way, he clashes with countless wielders and makes waves that shakes all planes or realms of existence! (Source Youku)

title: Honoo no Toukyuujyo Dodge Danko
titleNative: 炎の闘球女 ドッジ弾子
synopsis: The sequel to the legendary dodgeball manga Honou no Toukyuuji Dodge Danpei ! In this modern version of the hot-blooded dodgeball story, Danpei's daughter, Danko, follows in his footsteps, struggling to build a dodgeball team with the strongest fighting spirit in the modern age of 2025! Can Danko overcome the apathetic attitude of today's world? (Source: Corocoro, translated)

title: Unmei no Makimodoshi
synopsis: The series follows Chrono, a 14-year-old boy who is a member of the Space-Time Police Special Forces Unit called the “Rewinders”. The organization uses its “Retry Eye” to save people who have already died, using future knowledge to repeatedly go back in time to get to a future where the victim is alive and well. (Source: Crunchyroll News, edited)

title: GATE 2: Jieitai Kano Umi nite, Kaku Tatakaeri
titleRomaji: GATE 2: Jieitai Kano Umi nite, Kaku Tatakaeri
titleNative: GATE ２ ―自衛隊 彼の海にて、斯く戦えり―
synonyms: Gate Season 2: Thus the JSDF Fought in Their Seas!
GATE SEASON2 自衛隊 彼の海にて、斯く戦えり
synopsis: Thanks to the efforts of Lieutenant Yoji Itami (now Lieutenant First Class) of the Japan Ground Self-Defense Force, the once-closed "GATE" has safely reopened. The Japanese government, determined to maintain exclusive control over the "GATE", continues mobilizing the Self-Defense Forces for political and topographical surveys to build a peaceful relationship with the inhabitants of the Special Region. Captain First Class Edajima Goro of the Japan Maritime Self-Defense Force (JMSDF) and his subordinate, Petty Officer Second Class Tokushima Hajime, a skilled former chef, were conducting such diplomatic and investigative missions, traveling across the various nations of the Special Region. However, one day, their assignment suddenly escalates when they're tasked with a special mission to rescue an American journalist kidnapped on an island in the Special Region's Blue Sea. Immediately boarding the JMSDF Oyashio-class submarine Kitashio, they set sail into the ocean of another world, disco

title: Itou Junji: Crimson
synopsis: Crimson refers to the color crimson or bright red, and the concept of this volume is "monsters." This is a collection of horror stories that carefully selects masterpieces filled with unique madness, allowing you to immerse yourself in the eerie, bizarre, and yet original world of Junji Ito. (Source: Official Website, translated)

title: Ran Bi Wa
synopsis: This film is based on an ancient legend of the Qiang, an ethnic minority living in the mountainous regions of southwest China. It tells the story of a monkey who grows up among humans and follows the footsteps of his mother, Awubaji, to the Holy Mountain to uncover the secret of warmth. After undergoing many hardships and dangers, the monkey manages to get hold of a fire stone. His fur burns off and he finally turns into a human being. The film is rendered in the style of traditional Chinese ink painting and poetically envisions life in a prehistoric society. The story of the fire thief addresses timeless themes, such as growth and companionship, which are still important today. With Ran Bi Wa, the legendary Shanghai Animation Film Studio, birthplace of many iconic Chinese animations, is celebrating a triumphant return. (Source: Berlinale)

title: LABYRINTH
synopsis: One day, Shiori Maezawa, an ordinary high school girl, cracked her smartphone while falling down a staircase. As she wakes up, she finds herself in a deserted, parallel world that looks like Yokohama. When she looks at her smartphone, she finds a photo of herself that she doesn't remember posting on social media. What’s the source of this mysterious post? Will she be able to escape from this strange smartphone labyrinth? (Source: Official Site, translated)
